PowerShell(Write-Output "=== node ==="; node -v; Write-Output "=== npm ==="; npm -v; Write-Output "=== npx ==="; npx -v; Write-Output "=== where node ==="; \(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source)

PowerShell($ErrorActionPreference='SilentlyContinue'; $ready=$false; for\($i=0;$i -lt 30;$i++\){ try { $r=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:3000' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; if\($r.StatusCode -eq 200\){ Write-Output "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\) - bytes: $\($r.Content.Length\)"; $ready=$true; break } } catch {}; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2 }; if\(-not $ready\){ Write-Output 'Not ready yet' })
Bash(node -e "try { const s=require\('sharp'\); console.log\('sharp OK', s.versions.sharp\); } catch\(e\){ console.log\('NO sharp:', e.message.split\('\\n'\)[0]\); }")

Bash(perl -0pi -e 's/\\@media \\\(min-width: 1000px\\\) \\{\\n  \\.hero-funnel \\{ padding: 8px 0 26px; \\}\\n  \\.hero-funnel-inner \\{ gap: 10px; padding-top: 2px; \\}\\n  \\.hero-funnel \\.vsl-wrap\\.hero-portrait-wrap \\{ max-width: 290px !important; margin-top: 0; \\}\\n  \\.vsl-box\\.hero-portrait \\.vsl-image \\{ max-height: clamp\\\(210px, 34vh, 340px\\\); \\}\\n  \\.hero-h1 \\{ font-size: clamp\\\(28px, 3\\.3vw, 40px\\\); line-height: 1\\.16; \\}\\n  \\.hero-creds \\{ margin-top: 0; \\}\\n  \\.hero-name \\{ margin: 0; \\}\\n\\}/\\@media \(min-width: 1000px\) {\\n  .hero-funnel { padding: 6px 0 22px; }\\n  .hero-funnel-inner { gap: 8px; padding-top: 0; }\\n  .hero-funnel .vsl-wrap.hero-portrait-wrap { max-width: 252px !important; margin-top: 0; }\\n  .vsl-box.hero-portrait .vsl-image { max-height: clamp\(180px, 27vh, 280px\); }\\n  .hero-h1 { font-size: clamp\(26px, 3vw, 37px\); line-height: 1.14; }\\n  .eyebrow-pill { padding: 8px 18px; }\\n  .hero-creds { margin-top: 0; }\\n  .hero-name { margin: 0; font-size: clamp\(24px, 2.4vw, 30px\); }\\n  .hero-cta-block { margin-top: 2px; }\\n}/' funnel.css)
